brief.executiveSummary: This week's market integrity analysis reveals elevated manipulation risk across major exchanges. Wash trading remains the dominant threat vector, with 5 confirmed signals. Spoofing activity increased 40% week-over-week, particularly on altcoin pairs. Recommend enhanced monitoring of OKX and Bybit.
keyFindings: Wash trading signals up 40% from previous week
Artificial volume generation on stablecoin pairs
recommendations: Increase monitoring on OKX and Bybit
Flag accounts with synchronized trading patterns

events.eventSummary: Binance detected unusual trading patterns on BTC/USDT pair with synchronized buy-sell orders from multiple accounts. Investigation ongoing.
OKX reported suspicious volume spike on ETH/USDT with no corresponding price movement. Potential spoofing detected.
Coordinated pump detected on altcoin DOGE with 300% volume increase followed by sharp dump. Multiple wallets involved.
Kraken identified artificial volume generation on XRP/EUR pair. Wash trading scheme suspected.
Unusual order clustering detected on SOL/USD. Pattern consistent with spoofing tactics.
